overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a grand gothic hall interior from a video game, featuring high wooden ceilings, ornate chandeliers, tall arched windows, and students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. The scene maintains a steady atmospheric view with ambient character animations throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables and chandeliers

second matching chandelier visible deeper in the hall
tall gothic arched window with multiple panes allowing natural light
large dark wooden door with decorative stone archway above it at the far end of the hall
long wooden dining table with attached benches

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand gothic hall with high wooden ceilings and warm ambient lighting from chandeliers. Several students in dark robes sit at wooden tables, exhibiting subtle idle animations. The architecture features tall arched windows on the left wall and an ornate wooden door at the far end, creating an atmospheric academic environment typical of a magical school setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a grand gothic hall that preserves its solemn academic mood throughout. It begins with a wide view of the interior, where warm ambient light from ornate chandeliers illuminates high wooden ceilings and tall arched windows. As the camera lingers, the focus settles on students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables, their subtle idle animations adding a sense of lived-in stillness to the space. The scene then extends its perspective toward the far end of the room, framing an ornate wooden door that anchors the depth of the magical school setting.
